workbench_mode_summary.purpose: Internal motion and trailer planning: narrative, shots, audio briefs, and safety framing before spend.

trailer_outline_placeholders: 3. Beat sheet and draft script — [TBD notes]
4. Scene list and shot intentions — [TBD notes]
6. Shot list and poster copy prompts (no IP theft) — [TBD notes]
9. Safety and claim review pass — [TBD notes]
output_asset_checklist: Scene beat list with duration notes
Shot list with rights notes per shot
Music and sound brief (no license implied)
Poster or key-art brief (no generated art)
Safety and rights checklist with clearance TBDs
rights_safety_summary: Original material or documented permission before any public screeners.
Music brief does not grant sync or master use — separate rights path.
Poster or key-art brief does not grant IP — design or commission lane is separate.
Child or youth depiction triggers additional review per policy.
Commercial claims in trailer copy route through Z-SUSBV and entitlement posture when applicable.
review_questions_flat: Does this trailer honestly represent the feature?
Are all superlatives evidenced or removed?
Are minors or sensitive populations treated per policy?
Is any pricing, donation, or commercial CTA attached? If yes, route Z-SUSBV and entitlement review.
AMK decision: approve internal pack only — [date]
AMK decision: open public screener lane — [blocked until gate]
forbidden_actions: mimic protected living artists without permission
call external AI or media APIs
auto-merge trailer assets to production branches
required_human_gates: Rights or IP review before public use
Child or privacy review if minors or youth content involved
public_release_blocked_note: Public release, upload, paid media, and distribution remain blocked until AMK or human opens that lane with rights and policy sign-off.
law: AMK or human opens public release.
note: Read-only generator output. No binaries, no provider calls, no deploy.
